titleStmt.title: SII 18.108: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 108. (B.K. No. 80 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 33, Sarvadhāri, Pushya Amāvāsyā, Sunday, lunar eclipse, Saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1109, January 3, Sunday. There was, however, no Saṁkrānti on that day.

It registers a gift of tolls on betel leaves made by Nimbarasa along with the Gātrigas for music and dancing in the temple of Siddhēśvaradēva (at Hāvari). The gift was made in the presence of the Four-hundred Mahājanas of Hāvari (i.e., modern Hāvēri), who are highly praised in the record. A eulogistic account is also given of Nimbarasa and his father Daṇḍanāyaka Mādhava-bhaṭṭa who was in charge of the pannāya tax. Mahāpradhāna, Bhāṇasavergaḍe, Daṇḍanāyaka Anantapāḷa is stated to be governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand and to be in charge of vaḍḍarāvuḷa and pannāya taxes.
The record is stated to have been composed and written (on stone) by Nāraṇadēva of Viśvamitra-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī © svasti . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . ttraiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūḷastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabha
ṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya rājyamutta
rōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samadhiga
tapaṁcamahāśabdamahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ vibudhavaradā
yakaṁ sujanaprasaṁnaṁ nuḍidu matteṁnaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ parāṁganāputraṁ turayarēvaṁtaṁ vairikṛtāṁ
taṁ sāhasōttuṁganayyanasiṁgaṁ nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bhāṇasaverggaḍe daṁ
ḍanāyakananaṁtapāḷayyaṁgaḷ sudhādhavaḷitōttuṁgakīrttiyiṁ banavāsi pannircchā siramumaṁ vaḍḍarāvuḷada
pannāyada suṁkamumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadinanubhavisuttamire tatpādapadmōpa jīvi samadhigatapaṁcama
hāśabdamahāsāmaṁtādhipati mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ mādhavabhaṭṭar paṁnāyadanu bhavaṇiyalu varttisuttamire
Ī dharaṇītaḷaṁ pratidinaṁ sale baṇnisuguṁ pracaṁḍadaṁḍādhipanaṁ vidagdhabudhamāgadharakṣaka naṁ vivēkavidyādharanaṁ mahāmahima
naṁ sucaritrapavitragātranaṁ mādhavabhaṭṭanaṁ budhalalāṭataṭasthitaratnapaṭṭanaṁ . prabhu lakṣaṇadoḷ
saṁtasavibhavadoḷabhimānadoḷ viśuddhajñānaprabheyoḷ vākśrīramaṇīvibhu mādhava bhaṭṭaneseda
nakhiḷōrvvareyoḷ . Ā vidagdhamugdhagaṇikāmanōjana manōnayanavallabhe . ratigamaru
ndhatigaṁ vāksatigaṁ rūpinoḷudāttapatibhaktiyoḷanvitasakaḷakaḷāgamapariṇatiyoḷ sa
le kāḷikabbe migile negarddaḷ . v® . sarasijasaṁbhavaṁ baredu nirmmisidaṁ smaranarkkaṟiṁde vistarisidaneyde
saṁpadamanudbhavamaṁ sobagaṁ viḷāsamaṁ sarasakaḷāpravīṇateyanembinamunnativetta kāḷikabbarasiya
rūpanāṁ neṟeye baṇnipeneṁbavanegganallanē . Antavargge mudamumoḷpuṁ saṁtata mabhivṛddhiyuṁ mahā
vibhavamumantyaṁtaṁ janiyise janiyisidaṁ tanayaṁ niṁbanadhikamahimāḷaṁba . haracaraṇa sma
raṇāṁtaḥkaraṇa sākṣarikajanasamuddharaṇanivaṁ paramārtthameṁdu sale niṁbarasananu tkriṣṭaśiṣṭanika
raṁ pogaḷgu . patihitane maruttanayanāhavadhīrane savyasāci mikkatiśayarūpane ku
sumasāyakanunnatane surācaḷaṁ vitaraṇaśīḷane ravijanuttamane manumārgganeṁdu paṁḍita
janameyde baṇnipudu niṁbananī vasudhātaḷāgradoḷ . dhuradoḷidirāda vairige purahara
niṭiḷāmbakānaḷaṁ śaraṇeṁdādarisidaḍaṁbudhi vaṁdige surataru saripāṭisamanenippaṁ niṁba . v® .
paṁbalisalkevēḍa sibi bhānusuta prabhukhēcarādhirājaṁ baliyeṁba dānigaḷanu Ādaradiṁdava vaṁdi
bēḍu nīṁ saṁbarasūdanapratimarūpananapratimapratāpanaṁ niṁbananānatadviṭkadaṁ
bananudghaguṇāvaḷaṁbana . kaṁbugrīvada pīnanitaṁbada teḷvasiṟa pallavādharada cakō
rāṁbakayugaḷada sudatige saṁbarahara śarasamūhanallane niṁba . © Intu samasta
nijanāmāṁkamāḷikāsamētanappa niṁbarājaṁ gātrigasamūhaṁ berasu dharmmōdyu
ktacittarāgi śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 33 neya sarvvadhārisaṁvatsarada pu
ṣyadamavāsyeyādityavāradaṁdu sūryyagrahaṇa saṁkrānti vyatīpātameṁ
ba tidhigaḷoṁdāgaḷ yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapa
samādhiśīḷasaṁpannarssujanaprasannar rugyajussāmātharvvaṇavēdavēdāṁgapārā
vārapāragaraśēṣavaiśēṣikanaiyāyikalōkāyatasāṁkhyabauddhārhatāditarkka
śāstrapariṇatarmanvādyaṣṭādaśadharmmakuśaḷaragniṣṭōmādisaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthā
vagāhanapavitrīkṛtagātraramaḷacaritrarssarvvātithyabhyāgataviśiṣṭēṣṭavidva
jjanapūjakarsvadharmmapratipāḷakaradharmmaparihararvvicārasaṁpannarssāpānu
grahasamarttharśśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararēkavākyardvātriṁśatsahasrasamayāgra
gaṇyaragaṇyapuṇyarśrīmatsiddhēśvaradēvalabdhavaraprasādarappa śrīmadagrahā
raṁ hāvariya mahājanaṁ nālnūrvvarumaṁ nerapi saṁbhavaṇigeya daṁbulaṁ goṭṭu śrīma
tsiddhēśvaradēvargge gītavādyanṛtyakye vēḍi yaleya hēṟiṁge munnina naḍevare 5 vīsavo
ḷagāgi hēṟingoṁdu vīsamaṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍevantāgi biṭṭarintī dharmmama
nārōrvvaru pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgeyargghya
tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsira kavilegaḷa kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnuṁ beḷḷiyoḷuṁ kaṭṭisi sā
sirvvarvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarige koṭṭa phaḷamaneyduvarī dharmmavanārō
rvvaraḷidavaranitu tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷanitu kavilegaḷananibaru brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda
mahāpātakamaneyduvar . © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō dharmmaṁ haratē naraḥ . ṣaṣṭi
varṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . © praṇutārtthaṁ hṛdyamī padyani
cayamene pēḷdaṁ manaṁgoṁḍu vidvadgaṇamatyānaṁdadiṁ baṇnise baredani
daṁ satkavīṁdrastutaṁ nāraṇadēvaṁ pārvvatīvallabhapadayugaḷārādhakaṁ vipravaṁśā
graṇi viśvāmitragōtrāṁburuhavanapataṁgaṁ viśuddhāntaraṁga .
Digital edition of SII 18.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
